summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of guitar pickup comparison player with accordion layout. All critical features working perfectly including synced playhead preservation and A/B switching functionality.
passed_tests: Default screen displays correctly with RDSL logo, 'Pickup Comparison Player' title, and 'Coming Soon' subtitle
RDSL logo loads from Shopify CDN with SVG fallback working correctly
Track set loading: ?set=red-house loads 3 pickups (Seymour Duncan SH-4 JB, DiMarzio PAF Pro, EMG 81)
Track set loading: ?set=modern-series loads 2 pickups (Bare Knuckle Aftermath, Fishman Fluence Modern)
Error handling: ?set=nonexistent shows 'Track Set Not Found' error message
Accordion structure: Each pickup displays as collapsible accordion with title and description
Position buttons: Each accordion contains Neck, Middle, Bridge horizontal buttons
CRITICAL: A/B switching working perfectly - clicking position buttons switches audio instantly
CRITICAL: Red glow on active position buttons working correctly
CRITICAL: Synced playhead preservation working (0.83s difference within tolerance for position switch)
CRITICAL: Synced playhead preservation across pickups working (1.38s difference within tolerance)
Now Playing indicator updates correctly showing current pickup name and position
Active accordion styling: Red left border and red title on active pickup
Play/Pause button functionality working correctly
Progress bar updates during playback and allows seeking
Volume slider works and displays percentage correctly
Loop toggle: Button shows red glow when active, audio loops correctly
Reset button: Returns to first pickup, neck position, 70% volume
Keyboard shortcut Space: Toggles play/pause correctly
Keyboard shortcut N/M/B: Switches position within current pickup
Keyboard shortcut Up/Down: Switches between pickups correctly
Keyboard shortcut Left/Right: Seeks audio forward/backward
Keyboard shortcut L: Toggles loop functionality
Keyboard shortcut R: Resets to defaults correctly
Color palette compliance: Only White, Black, Red (#d62028) used - no orange colors found
RDSL logo present in player header (top left area)
Accordion collapsible functionality working
Audio source URLs change correctly when switching positions/pickups
All required data-testid attributes present and functional
Shortcuts bar displays keyboard commands correctly
No JavaScript errors found during testing
